children.title: Add CSV export for cashflow ledger
children.body: Users need to export the cashflow ledger as CSV for offline analysis.
acceptance_criteria: Export button present on the ledger view
CSV includes date, amount, category columns

children.title: Add cashflow forecast chart
children.body: Show a 90-day rolling forecast based on historical cashflow trends.
acceptance_criteria: Forecast recalculates when a new transaction is recorded
